zh.Boscastle, Cornwall, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾
zh.Cornwall, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾可瓦爾
zh.of Botreaux Castle, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald de Botreaux於1217年10月1日出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，他的父親William de Botreaux46歲，母親Sibella Mrs Boterell41歲。他於大約1242年與Margaret De Whitmore在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1273年7月4日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald de Botreaux于1217年10月1日出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾时，他的父亲William de Botreaux46岁，母亲Sibella Mrs Boterell41岁。他于大约1242年与Margaret De Whitmore在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1273年7月4日在英国英格兰可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald de Botreaux was born on 1 October 1217, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Botreaux, was 46 and his mother, Sibella Mrs Boterell, was 41. He married Margaret De Whitmore about 1242, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 July 1273, in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald de Botreaux est né le 1 octobre 1217, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Botreaux, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Sibella Mrs Boterell, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Margaret De Whitmore environ 1242, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1273, à Boscastle, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald de Botreaux am 1. Oktober 1217 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Botreaux 46 und seine Mutter Sibella Mrs Boterell 41. Er hat um 1242 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Margaret De Whitmore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Juli 1273 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Botreaux è nato il il 1 ottobre 1217 nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Botreaux, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Sibella Mrs Boterell, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Margaret De Whitmore circa 1242, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 luglio 1273, nel Boscastle, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.Cornwall, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルコルンワル
ja.of Botreaux Castle, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルボスカストル
ja.lifeSummary: Reginald de Botreauxが1217年10月1日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父William de Botreauxは46歳，母Sibella Mrs Boterellは41歳であった。約1242年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでMargaret De Whitmoreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1273年7月4日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルボスカストルで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald de Botreaux(이)가 1217년 10월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Botreaux(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibella Mrs Boterell(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Margaret De Whitmore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1273년 7월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 보스카스틀에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 October 1217–4 July 1273: 1 de outubro de 1217–4 de julho de 1273
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Botreaux nasceu em 1 de outubro de 1217, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Botreaux, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Sibella Mrs Boterell, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret De Whitmore aproximadamente 1242, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de julho de 1273, em Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald de Botreaux родился 1 октября 1217 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Botreaux было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibella Mrs Boterell, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret De Whitmore около 1242 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 июля 1273 г. в местности боскастл, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.1 October 1217–4 July 1273: 1 de octubre de 1217–4 de julio de 1273
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald de Botreaux nació el 1 de octubre de 1217, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Botreaux, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Sibella Mrs Boterell, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Margaret De Whitmore aproximadamente 1242, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de julio de 1273, en Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
